action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 5 segfaulted quickly, even with manual batching and subset of 5000 graphs. Analysis: Crash likely due to memory pressure or a PyG bug triggered by large Data object lists. Decision: Further reduce subset to 1000 graphs, avoid storing all batches in memory by building Data objects per subset and batching on-the-fly. Train for 3 epochs, save checkpoint, then submit eval to get first baseline and measure iteration time. Also ensure predict.py works for eval.
